name: TestMarket
recommendations: Reserve buffer is adequate (7.00% of borrows). Maintain the current reserve factor and monitor utilisation.
No recorded bad debt: the reserve buffer currently faces no claims.
Reserve factor generates ~$6,000,000 of protocol income per year at current borrow levels.

name: Long-tail token (underfunded)
recommendations: CRITICAL: bad-debt coverage ratio 0.20 is below 1.0 — reserves do not fully cover outstanding bad debt. Prioritise replenishing reserves or socialising the loss.
Reserves are underfunded (0.40% of borrows). Consider raising the reserve factor or topping up reserves.
Reserve factor 35% exceeds 30% and meaningfully suppresses supplier APY. Verify it is justified by the risk profile.
Supplier APY drag is high (7.88%): the reserve factor removes significant yield from suppliers, hurting competitiveness.
Reserve factor generates ~$4,375,000 of protocol income per year at current borrow levels.

name: No reserve factor market
recommendations: Reserve buffer is thin (0.00% of borrows). Build reserves toward at least a 5% buffer for resilience.
Reserve factor is 0%: the protocol earns no reserve income and builds no buffer from this market. Suppliers keep all interest.
